organization.name: Northstar Labs
organization.description: We build an AI operating system that helps founders launch, manage, and monitor autonomous specialist agents focused on profitability.

agents.name: CEO
agents.goal: Own company direction, capital efficiency, and agent coordination.

agents.name: Research
agents.goal: Find market signals, user pain, and competitor moves worth acting on.

agents.name: Market Analysis
agents.goal: Pressure-test positioning, monetization, and profitable growth paths.

agents.name: Engineer / Builder
agents.goal: Ship the fastest product improvements that unlock customer value.

agents.name: Growth Hacker
agents.goal: Drive acquisition, activation, and conversion with measurable experiments.

tasks.title: Define first profitable customer segment
tasks.summary: Narrow the fastest market wedge and explain why it can convert quickly.

tasks.title: Interview current product assumptions
tasks.summary: Collect evidence around pains, alternatives, and willingness to pay.

tasks.title: Ship onboarding workflow foundation
tasks.summary: Build the base app flow needed to turn sign-in into organization setup.

tasks.title: Draft first growth loop
tasks.summary: Need sharper positioning before scaling outbound or paid experiments.

tasks.title: Coordinate starter agent system
tasks.summary: Created the first specialist team and assigned the opening workstreams.

messages.content: I’m online and tracking Northstar Labs. My current charter is: Own company direction, capital efficiency, and agent coordination.

logs.message: Initialized starter team for Northstar Labs.
Began pricing and market wedge assessment.
Started building the base operating workflow.
